answerSnippets.question: Who is Mark Siazon?
answerSnippets.answer: Mark Siazon (@Iron-Mark) is a product designer and full-stack developer based in the Philippines. He builds proof-backed products in AI, mobile, and Web3. Portfolio: https://www.marksiazon.dev

answerSnippets.question: What is Mark Siazon open to?
answerSnippets.answer: Product design, full-stack engineering, AI workflow prototypes, mobile/Wear OS UX, and Web3 proof work — contract or full-time, Philippines and remote. Contact: https://www.marksiazon.dev/contact

answerSnippets.question: Where is Mark Siazon's full tech stack?
answerSnippets.answer: Full stack reference with 113 tools and doc links: https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/STACK.md

answerSnippets.question: How do I verify Mark Siazon's claims?
answerSnippets.answer: Use the proof matrix for verification boundaries and public receipts: https://www.marksiazon.dev/proof. Project case studies: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects

answerSnippets.question: What is HireProof?
answerSnippets.answer: HireProof is an AI trust and safety product for job seekers. Case study: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/hireproof · Live: https://hireproof.tech/portfolio

answerSnippets.question: What is ResQLink?
answerSnippets.answer: ResQLink is an offline-first emergency response platform. UMak InfotechOlympics 2025 Android Productivity Champion. Case study: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/resqlink

answerSnippets.question: What is BaybayInscribe?
answerSnippets.answer: BaybayInscribe is Baybayin ML and cultural education UX. InfotechOlympics 2024 Android winner. Case study: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/baybayinscribe · Model: https://huggingface.co/gilas/baybayinscribe

answerSnippets.question: What awards has Mark Siazon won?
answerSnippets.answer: UMak InfotechOlympics 2025 Android Productivity Champion (ResQLink); InfotechOlympics 2024 Android winner (BaybayInscribe); Stellar bootcamp Top 5 of 105 (Stellaroid Earn). https://www.marksiazon.dev/achievements

answerSnippets.question: Is Mark Siazon a designer or developer?
answerSnippets.answer: Both — product design engineer workflow from UX and design systems through React/Next.js/Flutter/Kotlin to deploy and verification.

answerSnippets.answer: Based in the Philippines; open to Southeast Asia and remote global roles.
